title: subworkflow - aws stop ec2 instance
description:
Subworkflow to stop an EC2 instance using AWS Systems Manager

Parameters:

instanceId: (Required) The ID of the EC2 instance to stop
awsregion: (Required) The AWS region where the instance resides
dynatraceawsconnection: (Required) Dynatrace AWS OIDC connection

Waits for the stop operation to complete with status verification
guide:
## ⏹️ **Subworkflow to Stop an EC2 Instance**

🛑 This subworkflow stops an EC2 instance using AWS Systems Manager Automation.

Waits for completion and validates successful shutdown.

---

### ⚙️ **Parameters**

- **instanceId** (Required): 🆔 EC2 instance ID to stop
- **awsregion** (Required): 🌍 AWS region
- **dynatraceawsconnection** (Required): 🔑 AWS OIDC connection

---
